visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a vibrant red t-shirt, sits at a light-colored wooden desk. She holds a small pink and white container of snacks. The background is a plain, off-white wall with a light switch visible on the right. Yellow and white text overlays appear at the center of the frame. (2) The woman switches to a large green bag of Nongshim brand melon-flavored puffs. She holds the bag close to the lens to show the illustrated character. She then opens the bag, revealing the lime-green, curved snacks inside. A small image of a real melon is digitally overlaid on the left. (3) She transitions to a pink bag of Swedish mix jelly. She pulls out a pink and blue heart-shaped gummy and takes a bite, showing the texture of the candy. Her facial expressions shift from curious to slightly disappointed as she examines the remaining candy in the bag. (4) The scene shifts as she presents a green box of onion-flavored seaweed. She opens the plastic tray, taking out a thin, rectangular sheet covered in seasoning. She eats several pieces rapidly, showing excitement through widened eyes and exaggerated chewing movements. Heart emojis float across the screen during this phase.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 只有在韓國吃的到的零食. [Logo]: @602avenue. (2) [Slogan]: The Snack You Can ONLY Try in Korea. (3) [Variety]: 大福冰淇淋軟糖. (4) [Subtitle]: 是不是台灣也有類似的冰淇淋? (5) [Subtitle]: 這個不是冰淇淋. (6) [Variety]: 超香. (7) [Subtitle]: 看起來有點像麻糬之類. (8) [Variety]: (莫名其妙). (9) [Subtitle]: 口感很像韓國年糕的軟糖?! (10) [Subtitle]: 你們知道韓國香蕉餅乾嗎? (11) [Variety]: 哈密瓜版本. (12) [Variety]: 好可愛. (13) [Subtitle]: 我不多說. (14) [Subtitle]: 你們如果在韓國發現這包? (15) [Subtitle]: 就要買10個以上喔. (16) [Subtitle]: 瑞典軟糖. (17) [Variety]: 超級超級超級. (18) [Variety]: 爆紅. (19) [Variety]: (確定踩雷). (20) [Variety]: (沒有生氣). (21) [Subtitle]: 洋蔥香味好濃郁! (22) [Subtitle]: 一次可以吃6盒. (23) [Variety]: 推薦!!!! (24) [Subtitle]: 凍結乾燥軟糖. (25) [Slogan]: 意思:原本是軟糖. (26) [Variety]: 口感超級特別... (27) [Subtitle]: 記得留言問Q&A問題喔!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator performing a product review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female with long, wavy brown hair, wearing a simple red short-sleeved t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room with a plain white wall and a light switch. The woman is seated at a neutral-toned wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy electronic dance track with a steady 4/4 beat starts immediately. A female voice speaks with high arousal and a bright, sharp pitch. She enunciates clearly with a fast speech rate, introducing various snacks. No ambient noise is present. (2) A crisp, high-frequency rustling sound of a plastic bag occurs as she handles the melon puffs. The music continues unabated. The speaker's pitch rises significantly as she expresses excitement. A 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a text reveal. (3) Rhythmic crunching and chewing sounds are audible as the subject tastes the snacks. These transients have a wide spectral bandwidth. The BGM remains in the background at a moderate volume. A subtle 'whoosh' transition sound bridges the cut between different products. (4) The BGM continues with synthesized melodies. The speaker's tone remains cheerful and authoritative. Repeated crunching sounds from the seaweed consumption create a rhythmic percussive texture that overlaps with the background music. The audio ends with a bright vocal sign-off.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequence of Items -> Reaction -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a travel-oriented food review focusing on unique snacks found in South Korea. The creator uses high-energy delivery and fast-paced editing to maintain engagement while providing first-person reactions to the taste and texture of specific brands.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While specific brands are shown, the format follows a typical 'haul' or 'review' vlog style rather than a paid sponsorship structure.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High visual and auditory energy typical of short-form social media reviews. The use of frequent text overlays and sound effects enhances the rhythmic pacing.
